title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Novartis India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Novartis India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India International Enterprises:
Novartis India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
